ship_par_l_trans_container_01_a.description: The reasonably fast Helios freighter is a staple of Paranid logistics operations. While it cannot be said to be best-in-class on any single performance metric, it remains a sound choice overall.nnThe enduring popularity of this heavy freighter is believed to be founded on its sleek lines and attractive profile. Freighter captains are no rock stars, but the Helios does turn heads. It is not uncommon for youngsters to seek out berthing Helios vessels, begging for a ship tour.nnThe Vanguard model is the fastest ship in the Helios line.
ship_par_l_trans_container_01_a.name: Helios Vanguard

ship_par_l_trans_container_01_b.description: The reasonably fast Helios freighter is a staple of Paranid logistics operations. While it cannot be said to be best-in-class on any single performance metric, it remains a sound choice overall.nnThe enduring popularity of this heavy freighter is believed to be founded on its sleek lines and attractive profile. Freighter captains are no rock stars, but the Helios does turn heads. It is not uncommon for youngsters to seek out berthing Helios vessels, begging for a ship tour.nnThe additional cargo space offered by the Helios Sentinel improves long term trading efficiency.
ship_par_l_trans_container_01_b.name: Helios Sentinel

ship_par_l_trans_container_02_a.description: The Paranid Selene is a modest heavy freighter lacking notable characteristics. If traders wish to move things, it does so without fanfare.nnThe Vanguard model was developed in an attempt to inspire some excitement around the Selene. Most commentators agree that this failed.
ship_par_l_trans_container_02_a.name: Selene Vanguard

ship_par_l_trans_container_02_b.description: The Paranid Selene is a modest heavy freighter lacking notable characteristics. If traders wish to move things, it does so without fanfare.nnThe Sentinel model raises the logistical performance of the Selene to levels that are generally considered to be adequate.
ship_par_l_trans_container_02_b.name: Selene Sentinel

ship_par_l_trans_container_03_a.description: The reasonably fast Helios freighter is a staple of Paranid logistics operations. While it cannot be said to be best-in-class on any single performance metric, it remains a sound choice overall.nnThe enduring popularity of this heavy freighter is believed to be founded on its sleek lines and attractive profile. Freighter captains are no rock stars, but the Helios does turn heads. It is not uncommon for youngsters to seek out berthing Helios vessels, begging for a ship tour.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_par_l_trans_container_03_a.name: Helios E

ship_par_m_corvette_01_a.description: The Paranid Nemesis is a highly sought-after corvette, boasting an attractive balance of speed, firepower and general versatility. The overall adaptability and build quality of the production line vessel ensure that the loadout options selected by owners can have a tangible impact on the tactical use-cases available.nnThe surprisingly fleet-footed base vessel can itself be optimised for speed by securing the Vanguard model.
ship_par_m_corvette_01_a.name: Nemesis Vanguard

ship_par_m_corvette_01_b.description: The Paranid Nemesis is a highly sought-after corvette, boasting an attractive balance of speed, firepower and general versatility. The overall adaptability and build quality of the production line vessel ensure that the loadout options selected by owners can have a tangible impact on the tactical use-cases available.nnThe Sentinel edition of the Nemesis offers additional resilience, which may be preferred by those operating in live fire environments.
ship_par_m_corvette_01_b.name: Nemesis Sentinel

ship_par_m_frigate_01_a.description: The Gorgon is a high performance Paranid frigate, developed in response to the threat posed by the Split Dragon.nnA popular escort vessel for capital ships, it can also provide the backbone for offensive fleets.nnThe Vanguard model is generally preferred for tactical offence.
ship_par_m_frigate_01_a.name: Gorgon Vanguard

ship_par_m_frigate_01_b.description: The Gorgon is a high performance Paranid frigate, developed in response to the threat posed by the Split Dragon.nnA popular escort vessel for capital ships, it can also provide the backbone for offensive fleets.nnThe Gorgon Sentinel is tailored for defensive operations, such as escort missions or station patrol.
ship_par_m_frigate_01_b.name: Gorgon Sentinel

ship_par_m_miner_liquid_01_a.description: The Paranid Plutus is a decidedly humble, medium-sized resource extractor, available in both mineral and gas extraction formats.nnThe Plutus is available in the Vanguard variation. This gas extractor is therefore marginally faster than its sister vessels.
ship_par_m_miner_liquid_01_a.name: Plutus (Gas) Vanguard

ship_par_m_miner_liquid_01_b.description: The Paranid Plutus is a decidedly humble, medium-sized resource extractor, available in both mineral and gas extraction formats.nnThis gas collector boasts increased resource storage capacity in the Sentinel model.
ship_par_m_miner_liquid_01_b.name: Plutus (Gas) Sentinel

ship_par_m_miner_solid_01_a.description: The Paranid Plutus is a decidedly humble, medium-sized resource extractor, available in both mineral and gas extraction formats.nnThe asteroid mining Vanguard model's enhancements do little to negate the vessel's understated presence. The ship remains eminently forgettable.
ship_par_m_miner_solid_01_a.name: Plutus (Mineral) Vanguard

ship_par_m_miner_solid_01_b.description: The Paranid Plutus is a decidedly humble, medium-sized resource extractor, available in both mineral and gas extraction formats.nnThe mining variant is available in a Sentinel model, which provides a helpful increase in solid storage capacity.
ship_par_m_miner_solid_01_b.name: Plutus (Mineral) Sentinel

ship_par_m_trans_container_01_a.description: This light freighter has a dark reputation. While verifiable facts are absent, pilots talk in hushed voices of an early Demeter outing. An apparently wealthy, yet eccentric and reclusive, Teladi mogul commissioned a freelance Demeter Captain to transport him and his cargo from Ianamus Zura to Argon Prime.nnRumour has it that the ship was subsequently found floating in space in the Silent Witness system. The Demeter was found with no Captain, crew, customer or cargo; no sign of attack or damage, and with completely cleared ship logs. No-one has heard from any of them since.nnThe Demeter remains popular with freighter captains untroubled by superstition. The Vanguard offers enhanced offensive capability for operations in more challenging sectors.
ship_par_m_trans_container_01_a.name: Demeter Vanguard

ship_par_m_trans_container_01_b.description: This light freighter has a dark reputation. While verifiable facts are absent, pilots talk in hushed voices of an early Demeter outing. An apparently wealthy, yet eccentric and reclusive, Teladi mogul commissioned a freelance Demeter Captain to transport him and his cargo from Ianamus Zura to Argon Prime.nnRumour has it that the ship was subsequently found floating in space in the Silent Witness system. The Demeter was found with no Captain, crew, customer or cargo; no sign of attack or damage, and with completely cleared ship logs. No-one has heard from any of them since.nnThe Demeter remains popular with freighter captains untroubled by superstition. The Sentinel model boasts additional resilience, tailored for commanders operating trade runs under fire.
ship_par_m_trans_container_01_b.name: Demeter Sentinel

ship_par_m_trans_container_02_a.description: The Hermes is a medium-sized Paranid-designed journeyman freighter with reasonable performance.nnWhile the Vanguard offers additional speed, even this model is widely considered to be unsuited to blockade running.
ship_par_m_trans_container_02_a.name: Hermes Vanguard

ship_par_m_trans_container_02_b.description: The Hermes is a medium-sized Paranid-designed journeyman freighter with reasonable performance.nnThe Sentinel model has improved cargo capacity and a somewhat hardened chassis.
ship_par_m_trans_container_02_b.name: Hermes Sentinel

ship_par_m_trans_container_03_a.description: The gradual Shutdown of the Jump Gates and the subsequent onset of the Dark shattered the shadowy organisation once known as the Duke's Buccaneers. Those that remained stalwart in their loyalty to the Pirate Duke had to rapidly adapt their operations to not be squashed under the heel of the newly emerging local authorities, or worse, fade into obscurity. Faced with the challenge to justify their further existence as an organisation, the majority of Buccaneer cells defaulted to the front they had already used for decades: the brutal, but dependable security outfit. Under this old and new guise, they acquired some renown transporting crucial personnel and wares for reconstruction and redevelopment. They also dealt in protection, corporate consulting, and other stunningly legal services. The support of well-equipped muscle proved useful for the leadership of the many societies that now struggled in isolation, and over the decades, the Buccaneers managed to refine their technology to suit the requirements of their new area of employment.nnThe Prometheus heavy transport is a relatively new addition to the arsenal of the Duke's Buccaneers, developed specifically to carry the lessons learned during the Dark into the era after the Realignment of the Jump Gates. Its hull is based on the Plutus, a well-known Paranid mining vessel. While earlier iterations of Buccaneer transport ships were often in fact civilian assets retrofitted for convenience, the design of the Prometheus is deliberate and insidious. Unless they were paying specific attention, any onlooker would simply see a mining ship, well-prepared for the dangers lurking at the edges of civilised space. On approach, such a hapless passerby or opportunistic brigand would soon realise that the inconspicuous hauler was in fact a well-armed pirate ship, perfectly equipped for a quick plunder. In one regard, the otherwise feigned identity as a deep space mining ship carries a sliver of truth, however: after a successful station raid, these ships tend to disappear towards the outskirts of a nearby sector, destination unknown.
ship_par_m_trans_container_03_a.name: Prometheus

ship_par_s_fighter_01_a.description: A fast, small fighter, with respectable hardpoints, the Paranid Perseus has a reasonable following among fighter pilots and explorers alike. Recommended to young captains in search of their second ship.nnThe Perseus Vanguard opts for a focus on speed.
ship_par_s_fighter_01_a.name: Perseus Vanguard

ship_par_s_fighter_01_b.description: A fast, small fighter, with respectable hardpoints, the Paranid Perseus has a reasonable following among fighter pilots and explorers alike. Recommended to young captains in search of their second ship.nnThe Perseus Sentinel has additional superstructure reinforcement at the cost of speed.
ship_par_s_fighter_01_b.name: Perseus Sentinel

ship_par_s_fighter_02_a.description: The Paranid Theseus is a solid, all-round performer with deadly firepower, built upon a solid chassis. If it is lacking anywhere it is in speed, though there are many tactical deployments where this is not a major issue.nnThe Vanguard model aims to rectify the speed issue, though it is debateable whether this is achieved, or even necessary.
ship_par_s_fighter_02_a.name: Theseus Vanguard

ship_par_s_fighter_02_b.description: The Paranid Theseus is a solid, all-round performer with deadly firepower, built upon a solid chassis. If it is lacking anywhere it is in speed, though there are many tactical deployments where this is not a major issue.nnGiven the Theseus' relaxed pace, many captains opt for the Sentinel model, which improves the vessel's ability to withstand attack.
ship_par_s_fighter_02_b.name: Theseus Sentinel

ship_par_s_heavyfighter_01_a.description: The Ares meets the much demanded need for a Paranid Heavy Fighter. Loaded with weapon hard points and shield generators, the Ares can both take and deliver a beating.
ship_par_s_heavyfighter_01_a.name: Ares

ship_par_s_miner_solid_01_a.description: With the design of the Tethys, the Paranid proved that mining ships don't have to be ugly. It is also available in light freighter format.nnThe Tethys Miner may have a humble function, but the Paranid have added joy to the hours spent chipping away at asteroids.
ship_par_s_miner_solid_01_a.name: Tethys (Mineral)

ship_par_s_scout_01_a.description: The Paranid Pegasus scout is extraordinarily fast, ensuring the "Peggy's" enduring popularity with explorers in particular. Unfortunately, being followed by such a speedy vessel risks inviting a rear end collision, an eventuality known by pilots as being "peggied".nnIn response to demand from the most speed-addicted customers, the Pegasus was eventually released in a Vanguard model.
ship_par_s_scout_01_a.name: Pegasus Vanguard

ship_par_s_scout_01_b.description: The Paranid Pegasus scout is extraordinarily fast, ensuring the "Peggy's" enduring popularity with explorers in particular. Unfortunately, being followed by such a speedy vessel risks inviting a rear end collision, an eventuality known by pilots as being "peggied".nnThe Sentinel model marginally increases the scout's cargo space and resilience. However, these enhancements seem to be cursory rather than conferring any practical value.
ship_par_s_scout_01_b.name: Pegasus Sentinel

ship_par_s_trans_container_01_a.description: The Paranid Tethys is considered to be one of the most enjoyable light freighters available to fly. It adopts the graceful lines common among Paranid ships, while performing admirably well for a small vessel.nnThe Tethys Vanguard boasts an impressive turn of speed.
ship_par_s_trans_container_01_a.name: Tethys Vanguard

ship_par_s_trans_container_01_b.description: The Paranid Tethys is considered to be one of the most enjoyable light freighters available to fly. It adopts the graceful lines common among Paranid ships, while performing admirably well for a small vessel.nnThe Sentinel model has increased cargo space.
ship_par_s_trans_container_01_b.name: Tethys Sentinel

ship_par_xl_builder_01_a.description: The Paranid Heracles is an enormous station-building ship, and as such, is the foundation of an economic empire.nnThe Heracles Vanguard offers additional speed, though it remains somewhat pedestrian.
ship_par_xl_builder_01_a.name: Heracles Vanguard

ship_par_xl_builder_01_b.description: The Paranid Heracles is an enormous station-building ship, and as such, is the foundation of an economic empire.nnThe Sentinel model is a hardened version of the Heracles.
ship_par_xl_builder_01_b.name: Heracles Sentinel

ship_par_xl_carrier_01_a.description: The Paranid Zeus is perhaps one of the fastest carriers available, making it an excellent choice as the keystone of any defensive or offensive fleet. The Zeus was designed specifically with this in mind, to allay growing Paranid concerns over the military growth of their many rivals.nnThe Zeus Vanguard is even faster, and is often the strategic choice in offensive operations.
ship_par_xl_carrier_01_a.name: Zeus Vanguard

ship_par_xl_carrier_01_b.description: The Paranid Zeus is perhaps one of the fastest carriers available, making it an excellent choice as the keystone of any defensive or offensive fleet. The Zeus was designed specifically with this in mind, to allay growing Paranid concerns over the military growth of their many rivals.nnThe Zeus is available in a Sentinel model, with a hardened superstructure for increased battle resilience.
ship_par_xl_carrier_01_b.name: Zeus Sentinel

ship_par_xl_carrier_02_a.description: The Paranid Zeus is perhaps one of the fastest carriers available, making it an excellent choice as the keystone of any defensive or offensive fleet. The Zeus was designed specifically with this in mind, to allay growing Paranid concerns over the military growth of their many rivals.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_par_xl_carrier_02_a.name: Zeus E

ship_par_xl_resupplier_01_a.description: The Paranid Atlas is a large spaceship, specifically designed to repair and resupply fleets. This advanced vessel is equipped with cutting-edge robotics technology, and capacity for an ample supply of materials and resources. It can travel throughout space, effectively operating as a limited, but mobile, Equipment Dock.nnThe upgraded Atlas Vanguard is faster and more agile than its predecessor, supporting quicker and more efficient martial campaigns.
ship_par_xl_resupplier_01_a.name: Atlas Vanguard

ship_par_xl_resupplier_01_b.description: The Paranid Atlas is a large spaceship, specifically designed to repair and resupply fleets. This advanced vessel is equipped with cutting-edge robotics technology, and capacity for an ample supply of materials and resources. It can travel throughout space, effectively operating as a limited, but mobile, Equipment Dock.nnThe Atlas Sentinel is a variant with a reinforced hull for increased durability and protection. The hardened structure allows the Atlas Sentinel to operate in more hazardous environments, and increase its longevity.
ship_par_xl_resupplier_01_b.name: Atlas Sentinel

ship_par_xl_resupplier_02_a.description: The Paranid Atlas is a large spaceship, specifically designed to repair and resupply fleets. This advanced vessel is equipped with cutting-edge robotics technology, and capacity for an ample supply of materials and resources. It can travel throughout space, effectively operating as a limited, but mobile, Equipment Dock.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_par_xl_resupplier_02_a.name: Atlas E

ship_par_xs_police_01_a.description: The Paranid authorities are notoriously strict, particularly if a captain is not of their species. It is advisable to remain polite and compliant with regard to the Station Security Vessels policing Paranid space.
ship_par_xs_police_01_a.name: Paranid Station Security Vessel

ship_tel_l_destroyer_01_a.description: When the Teladi Company commissioned a redesign of the Phoenix destroyer, their goal wasn't to create an all-conquering superweapon. Instead, their focus was to build a robust capital ship able to withstand the rigours of battle long enough for reinforcements to arrive.nnIn this regard, commanders concede that, as a defensive platform, the designers succeeded. The Phoenix is built on a steadfast chassis. The designers are said to be particularly proud of an intelligently dispersed engine placement, where the previous model's cluster resembled an enticing invitation for torpedo targeting.nnThe Vanguard model marginally negates the Phoenix's lack of speed and agility.
ship_tel_l_destroyer_01_a.name: Phoenix Vanguard

ship_tel_l_destroyer_01_b.description: When the Teladi Company commissioned a redesign of the Phoenix destroyer, their goal wasn't to create an all-conquering superweapon. Instead, their focus was to build a robust capital ship able to withstand the rigours of battle long enough for reinforcements to arrive.nnIn this regard, commanders concede that, as a defensive platform, the designers succeeded. The Phoenix is built on a steadfast chassis. The designers are said to be particularly proud of an intelligently dispersed engine placement, where the previous model's cluster resembled an enticing invitation for torpedo targeting.nnThe increased resilience afforded by the Sentinel model comes with a reduction in speed and agility that has caused some pilots to refer to the vessel as an asteroid with guns.
ship_tel_l_destroyer_01_b.name: Phoenix Sentinel

ship_tel_l_destroyer_02_a.description: When the Teladi Company commissioned a redesign of the Phoenix destroyer, their goal wasn't to create an all-conquering superweapon. Instead, their focus was to build a robust capital ship able to withstand the rigours of battle long enough for reinforcements to arrive.nnIn this regard, commanders concede that, as a defensive platform, the designers succeeded. The Phoenix is built on a steadfast chassis. The designers are said to be particularly proud of an intelligently dispersed engine placement, where the previous model's cluster resembled an enticing invitation for torpedo targeting.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_tel_l_destroyer_02_a.name: Phoenix E

ship_tel_l_miner_liquid_01_a.description: The Teladi Crane is a large miner with truly impressive load carrying capacity. Fulfilling a major part of Teladi primary resource acquisition, the Crane is available in models optimised for either mineral or gas collection.nnThe Vanguard variant enhances the Crane's speed, which may benefit entrepreneurs who are mining resources far from where they are required.
ship_tel_l_miner_liquid_01_a.name: Crane (Gas) Vanguard

ship_tel_l_miner_liquid_01_b.description: The Teladi Crane is a large miner with truly impressive load carrying capacity. Fulfilling a major part of Teladi primary resource acquisition, the Crane is available in models optimised for either mineral or gas collection.nnThe Sentinel variant enhances the Crane's cargo hold even further, though pilots should be aware that this may make them an attractive proposition for pirates.
ship_tel_l_miner_liquid_01_b.name: Crane (Gas) Sentinel

ship_tel_l_miner_liquid_02_a.description: The Teladi Crane is a large miner with truly impressive load carrying capacity. Fulfilling a major part of Teladi primary resource acquisition, the Crane is available in models optimised for either mineral or gas collection.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_tel_l_miner_liquid_02_a.name: Crane E (Gas)

ship_tel_l_miner_solid_01_a.description: The Teladi Crane is a large miner with truly impressive load carrying capacity. Fulfilling a major part of Teladi primary resource acquisition, the Crane is available in models optimised for either mineral or gas collection.nnThe Vanguard variant enhances the Crane's speed, which may benefit entrepreneurs who are mining resources far from where they are required.
ship_tel_l_miner_solid_01_a.name: Crane (Mineral) Vanguard

ship_tel_l_miner_solid_01_b.description: The Teladi Crane is a large miner with truly impressive load carrying capacity. Fulfilling a major part of Teladi primary resource acquisition, the Crane is available in models optimised for either mineral or gas collection.nnThe Sentinel variant enhances the Crane's cargo hold even further, though pilots should be aware that this may make them an attractive proposition for pirates.
ship_tel_l_miner_solid_01_b.name: Crane (Mineral) Sentinel

ship_tel_l_miner_solid_02_a.description: The Teladi Crane is a large miner with truly impressive load carrying capacity. Fulfilling a major part of Teladi primary resource acquisition, the Crane is available in models optimised for either mineral or gas collection.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_tel_l_miner_solid_02_a.name: Crane E (Mineral)

ship_tel_l_trans_container_01_a.description: The Teladi Pelican is notable for its mediocrity as a freighter. It has taken to the level of an art form the capacity to be neither outstandingly good nor bad on any single metric. The single greatest mystery is why Teladi traders themselves use this ship, when there are many other more profitable options available.nnThe Vanguard model's increased speed manages to make the vessel even less profitable due to a reduction in cargo space.
ship_tel_l_trans_container_01_a.name: Pelican Vanguard

ship_tel_l_trans_container_01_b.description: The Teladi Pelican is notable for its mediocrity as a freighter. It has taken to the level of an art form the capacity to be neither outstandingly good nor bad on any single metric. The single greatest mystery is why Teladi traders themselves use this ship, when there are many other more profitable options available.nnRecognising the commercial weakness of the Pelican, the Sentinel model boasts increased cargo space, improving the ship's overall trade run profitability.
ship_tel_l_trans_container_01_b.name: Pelican Sentinel

ship_tel_l_trans_container_02_a.description: The Teladi Company's Heron is a large freighter. It is noted for its somewhat relaxed pace, which is in keeping with mainstream Teladi design values.nnThe Vanguard model marginally improves the Heron's speed, but the vessel remains unsuited to express delivery.
ship_tel_l_trans_container_02_a.name: Heron Vanguard

ship_tel_l_trans_container_02_b.description: The Teladi Company's Heron is a large freighter. It is noted for its somewhat relaxed pace, which is in keeping with mainstream Teladi design values.nnThe Sentinel model is popular in military academies for use in remedial target practice.
ship_tel_l_trans_container_02_b.name: Heron Sentinel

ship_tel_l_trans_container_03_a.description: The Teladi Company's Heron is a large freighter. It is noted for its somewhat relaxed pace, which is in keeping with mainstream Teladi design values.nnThe E-model variation was introduced at a later date, and updated the superficial design to bring it up to par with Commonwealth standards that were established during the period of disconnection. The precursor version is slowly being phased out, but will remain available for interested third parties.
ship_tel_l_trans_container_03_a.name: Heron E

ship_tel_m_bomber_01_a.description: While originally designed as a bomber, the Teladi Peregrine has recently found popularity in the role of an escort ship. Its primary tactical advantage in this regard is its excellent turret coverage, which can be highly effective when appropriately armed.nnThe Vanguard model, with additional speed, was an attempt to retrofit the Peregrine to make it more suitable for its original intended role. Debate continues as to whether this was a success.
ship_tel_m_bomber_01_a.name: Peregrine Vanguard

ship_tel_m_bomber_01_b.description: While originally designed as a bomber, the Teladi Peregrine has recently found popularity in the role of an escort ship. Its primary tactical advantage in this regard is its excellent turret coverage, which can be highly effective when appropriately armed.nnThe Peregrine Sentinel leans into this novel escort role, offering increased superstructure resilience.
ship_tel_m_bomber_01_b.name: Peregrine Sentinel

ship_tel_m_frigate_01_a.description: The Teladi Osprey is a surprisingly effective frigate with significant cargo capacity. On this basis, it can be used as a well-armed and speedy alternative to a standard freighter for trade runs where prejudice is anticipated.nnThe Vanguard model enhances speed, and as a consequence, the potential profitability of trading routes.
ship_tel_m_frigate_01_a.name: Osprey Vanguard

ship_tel_m_frigate_01_b.description: The Teladi Osprey is a surprisingly effective frigate with significant cargo capacity. On this basis, it can be used as a well-armed and speedy alternative to a standard freighter for trade runs where prejudice is anticipated.nnThe Sentinel variation compromises speed in favour of additional cargo space.
ship_tel_m_frigate_01_b.name: Osprey Sentinel

ship_tel_m_miner_liquid_01_a.description: While ostensibly a resource harvester, some enterprising captains have repurposed the Teladi Manorina as a low-cost gunship, taking full advantage of its outstanding shielding capacity. Some even go as far as retaining the mining drill as a weapon, due to its extended range. Suspicions are occasionally expressed that this is a Teladi artifice for trading a weapon of war under civilian guise, avoiding the requirement for a military licence.nnThe Manorina can also be used to collect gas, and the Vanguard model adds a useful degree of speed.
ship_tel_m_miner_liquid_01_a.name: Manorina (Gas) Vanguard

ship_tel_m_miner_liquid_01_b.description: While ostensibly a resource harvester, some enterprising captains have repurposed the Teladi Manorina as a low-cost gunship, taking full advantage of its outstanding shielding capacity. Some even go as far as retaining the mining drill as a weapon, due to its extended range. Suspicions are occasionally expressed that this is a Teladi artifice for trading a weapon of war under civilian guise, avoiding the requirement for a military licence.nnThe Manorina can also be used for harmless gas collection. The Sentinel model boasts increased storage capacity.
ship_tel_m_miner_liquid_01_b.name: Manorina (Gas) Sentinel

ship_tel_m_miner_solid_01_a.description: While ostensibly a resource harvester, some enterprising captains have repurposed the Teladi Manorina as a low-cost gunship, taking full advantage of its outstanding shielding capacity. Some even go as far as retaining the mining drill as a weapon, due to its extended range. Suspicions are occasionally expressed that this is a Teladi artifice for trading a weapon of war under civilian guise, avoiding the requirement for a military licence.nnThe Manorina can also be used to mine asteroids, and the Vanguard model adds a degree of speed in either use case.
ship_tel_m_miner_solid_01_a.name: Manorina (Mineral) Vanguard

ship_tel_m_miner_solid_01_b.description: While ostensibly a resource harvester, some enterprising captains have repurposed the Teladi Manorina as a low-cost gunship, taking full advantage of its outstanding shielding capacity. Some even go as far as retaining the mining drill as a weapon, due to its extended range. Suspicions are occasionally expressed that this is a Teladi artifice for trading a weapon of war under civilian guise, avoiding the requirement for a military licence.nnThe Manorina can also be used to mine asteroids, and the Sentinel variation adds some resilience to stray rocks or foes alike.
ship_tel_m_miner_solid_01_b.name: Manorina (Mineral) Sentinel

ship_tel_m_trans_container_01_a.description: The Teladi Vulture medium freighter, while generally unassuming, remains a popular choice for independent traders in particular. It has excellent cargo capacity, more than making up for its lack of speed, on an analysis of trade route profitability.nnThe Vanguard model increases speed marginally, however, this comes with a reduction in cargo space.
ship_tel_m_trans_container_01_a.name: Vulture Vanguard

ship_tel_m_trans_container_01_b.description: The Teladi Vulture medium freighter, while generally unassuming, remains a popular choice for independent traders in particular. It has excellent cargo capacity, more than making up for its lack of speed, on an analysis of trade route profitability.nnThe Sentinel variant has perhaps the largest cargo space of any medium freighter, meriting consideration from any mogul seeking to optimise profits.
ship_tel_m_trans_container_01_b.name: Vulture Sentinel

ship_tel_m_trans_container_02_a.description: The Teladi Tern is a surprisingly cost effective and efficient freighter, a staple of many trading corporations. Its affordability and solid performance make it one of the more popular Teladi vessel designs.nnThe Vanguard model is optimised for speed, however, the reduction in cargo capacity reduces the Tern's overall trading performance.
ship_tel_m_trans_container_02_a.name: Tern Vanguard

ship_tel_m_trans_container_02_b.description: The Teladi Tern is a surprisingly cost effective and efficient freighter, a staple of many trading corporations. Its affordability and solid performance make it one of the more popular Teladi vessel designs.nnThe Tern Sentinel variant has a hardened hull composite, and is favoured by many traders.
ship_tel_m_trans_container_02_b.name: Tern Sentinel

ship_tel_m_trans_container_03_a.description: The Cormorant is unusual for a Teladi ship as it is tailored for freelancers. A light freighter with very basic construction specifications, it is inexpensive and accessible for most entrepreneurs starting out in business.nnThe Cormorant Vanguard is not well armed, however, it is resilient. Many of the fittings successfully remain attached during spaceflight.
ship_tel_m_trans_container_03_a.name: Cormorant Vanguard

ship_tel_s_fighter_01_a.description: The Teladi Falcon is a well regarded fighter. Its excellent speed, paired with reasonable strength and weaponry, make it a popular choice for fighter pilots on a budget.nnThe additional speed conferred by the Vanguard model opens up the possibility of the Falcon being used as a tactical interceptor.
ship_tel_s_fighter_01_a.name: Falcon Vanguard

ship_tel_s_fighter_01_b.description: The Teladi Falcon is a well regarded fighter. Its excellent speed, paired with reasonable strength and weaponry, make it a popular choice for fighter pilots on a budget.nnThe Falcon Sentinel is thought by many to be a compromise too far, with reduced speed and increased resilience rendering the overall performance somewhat mediocre.
ship_tel_s_fighter_01_b.name: Falcon Sentinel

ship_tel_s_fighter_02_a.description: While the Teladi seem to have great affection for their Buzzard fighter, this is not without an awareness of its limitations.nn"Tough as brick, fast as brick" is the unofficial strapline adopted by Buzzard pilots, and it is often seen painted on hulls.nnThe Buzzard seems to be designed to survive long enough for help to come rather than tackling assailants head-on. The modest additional speed provided by the Vanguard model is unlikely to make a difference to pilots' tactical options.
ship_tel_s_fighter_02_a.name: Buzzard Vanguard

ship_tel_s_fighter_02_b.description: While the Teladi seem to have great affection for their Buzzard fighter, this is not without an awareness of its limitations.nn"Tough as brick, fast as brick" is the unofficial strapline adopted by Buzzard pilots, and it is often seen painted on hulls.nnThe Buzzard seems to be designed to survive long enough for help to come rather than tackling assailants head-on. The Sentinel variant leans into this design strategy.
ship_tel_s_fighter_02_b.name: Buzzard Sentinel

ship_tel_s_miner_solid_01_a.description: The Teladi Company designed the Magpie as an entry-level commerce vessel, often gifted to younglings as a rite of passage on their entrepreneurship debut. Incapable of large scale trade, veterans often boast of their achievements with the limitations afforded by their first, sole Magpie.nnThe mining variant represents a strategic choice for more serious younglings seeking to make a name for themselves. Not as flashy as the Vanguard, nor as solid as the Sentinel, it is often those who choose the mining workhorse as their first ship who go on to become renowned tycoons.
ship_tel_s_miner_solid_01_a.name: Magpie (Mineral)

ship_tel_s_scout_01_a.description: There are faster scouts than the Teladi Kestrel, yet it still manages to function respectably. It is more solid than most of its competitors, and has respectable shield energy.nnPilots commonly opt for the somewhat faster Vanguard model.
ship_tel_s_scout_01_a.name: Kestrel Vanguard

ship_tel_s_scout_01_b.description: There are faster scouts than the Teladi Kestrel, yet it still manages to function respectably. It is more solid than most of its competitors, and has respectable shield energy.nnThe Kestrel Sentinel is thought by some to be a compromise too far, in terms of speed. However, there are those who prefer the toughened hull that it offers.
ship_tel_s_scout_01_b.name: Kestrel Sentinel

ship_tel_s_scout_02_a.description: Teladi playboy adventurer Yayasisos Tumulis Wegoras V popularised the Guillemot through his atypical antics. Unlike his entrepreneurial peers, "Yaya" built his wealth through a series of daring scout and courier missions, investing his rewards in other businesses.nnWhile Teladi youth venerate Yaya for his adventures, few diverge from the traditional mining, manufacturing and trading expectations of their parents.nnYaya himself is a somewhat shadowy figure, whose purported wealth is obfuscated by an unknown number of shell companies. It is believed that many of his exploits are entirely fictional and, though there are no arrest warrants in his name, it is believed that several police forces would like to have a word with him.nnThe Guillemot Vanguard is somewhat faster than the basic model and, as such, is thought to be Yaya's preference.
ship_tel_s_scout_02_a.name: Guillemot Vanguard

ship_tel_s_scout_02_b.description: Teladi playboy adventurer Yayasisos Tumulis Wegoras V popularised the Guillemot through his atypical antics. Unlike his entrepreneurial peers, "Yaya" built his wealth through a series of daring scout and courier missions, investing his rewards in other businesses.nnWhile Teladi youth venerate Yaya for his adventures, few diverge from the traditional mining, manufacturing and trading expectations of their parents.nnYaya himself is a somewhat shadowy figure, whose purported wealth is obfuscated by an unknown number of shell companies. It is believed that many of his exploits are entirely fictional and, though there are no arrest warrants in his name, it is believed that several police forces would like to have a word with him.nnThe Guillemot Sentinel is a less romanticised model, though more practical for everyday use.
ship_tel_s_scout_02_b.name: Guillemot Sentinel

ship_tel_s_trans_container_01_a.description: The Teladi Company designed the Magpie as an entry-level commerce vessel, often gifted to younglings as a rite of passage on their entrepreneurship debut. Incapable of large scale trade, veterans often boast of their achievements with the limitations afforded by their first, sole Magpie.nnThe Vanguard variant of this light courier provides an enhancement to speed and is a popular choice for novice younglings.
ship_tel_s_trans_container_01_a.name: Magpie Vanguard

ship_tel_s_trans_container_01_b.description: The Teladi Company designed the Magpie as an entry-level commerce vessel, often gifted to younglings as a rite of passage on their entrepreneurship debut. Incapable of large scale trade, veterans often boast of their achievements with the limitations afforded by their first, sole Magpie.nnThe Magpie's Sentinel model is more resilient than others in its class.
ship_tel_s_trans_container_01_b.name: Magpie Sentinel

ship_tel_s_trans_container_02_a.description: The Raven is a recent, classified Ministry of Finance Science Division prototype for a new high security Courier. Its development was the Ministry's attempt at a cheap and technological solution to the Syndicate piracy problem introduced by the reconnection of Windfall to the Gate network. Developed in a department on Woodworm Scrubs, the Raven was the first ship to be suited for experimental cargo spoofing technology. Attempted scan readings present the cargo hold as filled with worthless wares, which should deter piracy attempts or make them less likely. While originally the Raven was required to develop this technology, it can now be applied more universally, and might protect ships not only from pirates, but also from police looking for illicit goods.
ship_tel_s_trans_container_02_a.name: Raven

ship_tel_xl_builder_01_a.description: The Teladi Albatross is a giant, station-building ship. It is not a work of art, however, it functions well and provides the infrastructure for much of the Teladi growth economy.nnThe Vanguard variant provides a little extra speed, for when a station needs to be placed in a hurry.
ship_tel_xl_builder_01_a.name: Albatross Vanguard

ship_tel_xl_builder_01_b.description: The Teladi Albatross is a giant, station-building ship. It is not a work of art, however, it functions well and provides the infrastructure for much of the Teladi growth economy.nnThe Sentinel model has improved defensive capabilities, and may be a more suitable option when developing frontier regions.
ship_tel_xl_builder_01_b.name: Albatross Sentinel

ship_tel_xl_carrier_01_a.description: The Ministry of Finance commissioned the Condor to be the mainstay of a carrier fleet. While the ship borrows heavily from Split technology, its implementation could not result in a less "Split" vessel.nnHeavily reinforced, the Condor is capable of launching a battle fleet under heavy fire. The Vanguard variant provides additional speed, allowing the Condor to get into, and out of, difficult situations with a little more ease.
ship_tel_xl_carrier_01_a.name: Condor Vanguard

ship_tel_xl_carrier_01_b.description: The Ministry of Finance commissioned the Condor to be the mainstay of a carrier fleet. While the ship borrows heavily from Split technology, its implementation could not result in a less "Split" vessel.nnHeavily reinforced, the Condor is capable of launching a battle fleet under heavy fire. The Sentinel variant braces the ship further, providing a daunting resilience to attack.
ship_tel_xl_carrier_01_b.name: Condor Sentinel

ship_tel_xl_resupplier_01_a.description: Auxiliary vessels are essential for fleet management and are able to repair and resupply fleets of all sizes, including carriers. The Teladi Stork fulfils this function passably well. Its lack of general popularity within its class often means it is available at a reasonable price. Fleet managers are advised to keep the Stork well escorted as it is vulnerable to attack.nnThe Vanguard model enhances the Stork's speed, which enables it to remain in fleet formation more easily.
ship_tel_xl_resupplier_01_a.name: Stork Vanguard

ship_tel_xl_resupplier_01_b.description: Auxiliary vessels are essential for fleet management and are able to repair and resupply fleets of all sizes, including carriers. The Teladi Stork fulfils this function passably well. Its lack of general popularity within its class often means it is available at a reasonable price. Fleet managers are advised to keep the Stork well escorted as it is vulnerable to attack.nnThe Stork Sentinel has increased resilience, though not to the degree that it should be left unattended in hostile space.
ship_tel_xl_resupplier_01_b.name: Stork Sentinel

ship_tel_xs_police_01_a.description: While the Teladi are tolerant of the trading of many wares that are illegal elsewhere in the Commonwealth, access to those markets requires the good maintenance of a trader's reputation. It is wise to remain respectful of the Teladi Police and their Station Security Vessels.
ship_tel_xs_police_01_a.name: Teladi Station Security Vessel A

ship_tel_xs_police_02_a.description: While the Teladi are tolerant of the trading of many wares that are illegal elsewhere in the Commonwealth, access to those markets requires the good maintenance of a trader's reputation. It is wise to remain respectful of the Teladi Police and their Station Security Vessels.
ship_tel_xs_police_02_a.name: Teladi Station Security Vessel B

ship_tel_xs_police_03_a.description: While the Teladi are tolerant of the trading of many wares that are illegal elsewhere in the Commonwealth, access to those markets requires the good maintenance of a trader's reputation. It is wise to remain respectful of the Teladi Police and their Station Security Vessels.
ship_tel_xs_police_03_a.name: Teladi Station Security Vessel C

ship_xen_l_terraformer_01_a.description: Once, the H stood as the pinnacle of Terraformer technology, and was used for all terraforming projects, utilising its seismic guns to quickly alter terrain. In its new role, it functions primarily as a fast-strike drone carrier, able to punch through enemy defences with its powerful weaponry, quickly driving into their midst and unleashing its host of drones.
ship_xen_l_terraformer_01_a.name: H

ship_xen_m_corvette_01_a.description: Created at the same time as the smaller F class, to complement it in larger construction projects, the B's main armaments are cutting beams, initially used to prepare materials for other ships to use. The B proved to be effective in an offensive role as well, mostly due to its robust hull.
ship_xen_m_corvette_01_a.name: B

ship_xen_m_corvette_02_a.description: The lack of intel or communication about the Xenon renders even the most basic questions unanswerable. For example, why does the Xenon P corvette resemble an Earth trilobite?nnRegardless of the inscrutability of Xenon design philosophy, the P remains a fearsome adversary in battle.
ship_xen_m_corvette_02_a.name: PE

ship_xen_m_fighter_01_a.description: The lack of intel or communication about the Xenon renders even the most basic questions unanswerable. For example, why does the Xenon P corvette resemble an Earth trilobite?nnRegardless of the inscrutability of Xenon design philosophy, the P remains a fearsome adversary in battle.
ship_xen_m_fighter_01_a.name: P

ship_xen_m_miner_01_a.description: The Xenon S is a light miner/freighter supporting the AI collective's primary resource logistics.
ship_xen_m_miner_01_a.name: S

ship_xen_m_miner_solid_01_a.description: The Xenon S is a light miner/freighter supporting the AI collective's primary resource logistics.nnThe SE is a more recent variant of the S, and while information is limited on the exact differences between the two versions, it is possibly only a minor superficial evolution of the design. A peculiarity is that the SE is one of the few instances in which the intermediate steps in Xenon evolution are present, rather than being confronted with almost entirely new designs after countless presumed iterations of unseen ships. Scientists hope that studying these ships may give valuable information leading to an understanding of the mechanisms and pressures behind Xenon evolution, so that the threat can be more efficiently counteracted.
ship_xen_m_miner_solid_01_a.name: SE

ship_xen_s_fighter_01_a.description: While the N is one of the more palatable Xenon adversaries a captain may face, this fighter is disappointingly rarely found alone. It is common to encounter the Xenon N in a fleet or "swarm", which may also include the heavier, M class fighter.
ship_xen_s_fighter_01_a.name: N

ship_xen_s_fighter_02_a.description: The Xenon M is, alone, a robust heavy fighter. Unfortunately, it rarely is alone, commonly engaging as part of a fleet or "swarm" of M and N vessels.
ship_xen_s_fighter_02_a.name: M

ship_xen_s_heavyfighter_01_a.description: Originally a construction drone, the F has since evolved its robust hull for the rigours of interstellar battle. It is now the core fighter for the Terraformer fleet, its slow speed being easily balanced by its sturdy nature, allowing it to absorb all the damage from smaller faster ships while it unleashes its weapons.
ship_xen_s_heavyfighter_01_a.name: F

ship_xen_s_scout_01_a.description: Unlike most Xenon ships, the T scout can be destroyed quite easily, if it can be caught. The T is extraordinarily fast, with an extreme optimisation for speed over all other criteria.
ship_xen_s_scout_01_a.name: T

ship_xen_xl_carrier_01_a.description: The Xenon I is a station commander's worst nightmare. Armed with graviton turrets, which are among the most powerful weapons known in their class, the appearance of this battleship inevitably heralds an imminent and catastrophic hull depletion event.nnThose who are operating facilities under attack by the Xenon I rarely have reactive tactical options beyond a speedy evacuation. Station commanders are advised to prepare defences well in advance, rather than waiting for intelligence indicating increased Xenon activity.nnSaving credits on defensive preparations will, without doubt, prove costly in the event of a Xenon I assault.
ship_xen_xl_carrier_01_a.name: I

ship_xen_xl_destroyer_01_a.description: The Xenon K is an unfortunately impressive destroyer with armaments sufficient to wipe out capital ships and stations alike. Its formidable shielding should be accounted for when devising counter-tactics.nnNotable Split warrior Ya t'Plp has earned the soubriquet "K-Dog" for her proficiency in engaging the Xenon K. Her widely published engagement records are required reading in military academies across the known galaxy.nnt'Plp's guidance on the K is "Destroy escorts first, then neutralise engines. Then attack, attack, attack. Must waste shields and hull before engines regenerate. Many guns will be needed."
ship_xen_xl_destroyer_01_a.name: K

silicon.description: Silicon, required for the production of the most common types of silicon wafers, is usually mined or harvested from asteroids or other uninhabited celestial bodies.
silicon.name: Silicon

siliconwafers.description: If a technology requires any kind of chip, it is highly likely that is uses silicon wafers. Light, efficient and cheap to produce, these wafers are usually layered or constructed in hexagonal meshes to allow for quick transfer of data across a component.
siliconwafers.name: Silicon Wafers

smartchips.description: A specialised form of microchip that contains a small amount of heuristic programming, these chips cannot allow a system to learn, but can allow for small, snap intelligent decision-making that assists in targeting systems and makes autonomous piloting more accurate. These chips are primarily used in guided missiles and drones.
smartchips.name: Smart Chips

software_dockmk1.description: This flight software automates the final stages of the docking procedure.
software_dockmk1.name: Docking Computer Mk1

software_dockmk2.description: This flight software increases the range at which the docking procedure can be automated.
software_dockmk2.name: Docking Computer Mk2

software_flightassistmk1.description: This flight software assists a pilot by automatically compensating for drift when changing flight direction.
software_flightassistmk1.name: Flight Assist Software Mk1

software_hackerspacesuitmk1.description: The suit-deployed Hacking Tool offers pilots an interface to ship, installation and other systems that require direct access.nnHacking is, unsurprisingly, illegal in most jurisdictions. Pilots are advised not to be seen using this tool.
software_hackerspacesuitmk1.name: Hacking Tool

software_oxygenspacesuitmk1.description: The spacesuit Oxygen Upgrade is essential for those pilots whose priorities demand more EVA time.
software_oxygenspacesuitmk1.name: Oxygen Upgrade

software_scannerlongrangemk1.description: This scanning software provides a means to detect objects at great distances.
software_scannerlongrangemk1.name: Long Range Scanner Software Mk1

software_scannerlongrangemk2.description: This scanning software increases scan resolution, allowing more accurate identification of certain types of objects.
software_scannerlongrangemk2.name: Long Range Scanner Software Mk2

software_scannerobjectmk1.description: This scanning software provides basic identification of nearby objects.
software_scannerobjectmk1.name: Basic Scanner

software_scannerobjectmk2.description: This scanning software allows a pilot to inspect the contents of the cargo hold of another ship. Its use is illegal unless an appropriate police licence has been obtained.
software_scannerobjectmk2.name: Police Scanner

software_scannerobjectmk3.description: This scanning software is used to penetrate even military-grade shielded targets and obtain information. It has a very short range and can only be used while in a space suit. Its use is illegal, with or without a police licence.
software_scannerobjectmk3.name: Spacesuit Scanner

software_targetmk1.description: This targeting software allows a ship's targeting system to lock on to small objects such as debris and floating containers.
software_targetmk1.name: Targeting Computer Extension Mk1

software_trademk1.description: This trading software maintains a link to potential buyers and sellers for a limited time, to provide current trade offer information.
software_trademk1.name: Trading Computer Extension Mk1

sojabeans.description: A small bean grown all across Paranid space, the soja bean adds flavour and nutritional value to the soja husk; the Paranids' primary food source. While this is its primary purpose, on many Paranid colonies it is also dried and ground into a powder and mixed with water, creating a flavoured and healthy drink that provides Paranid with ample energy.
sojabeans.name: Soja Beans

sojahusk.description: A Paranid dish; soja beans that have been crushed into a paste and mixed with the flesh of the maja snail, then served in a maja snail shell, soja husk is accepted as both a tasteful and nutritious meal by the Paranid, though there are few non-Paranid who have dared try it.
sojahusk.name: Soja Husk

spacefuel.description: Spacefuel is made from processing and distilling wheat, water and a blend of spices. It is a cheap but strong alcoholic beverage that has been made illegal to trade in bulk across the Jump Gate network in an attempt to avoid drunken accidents on both ships and stations. In order to sell spacefuel as a beverage, one must be a licenced bar owner.
spacefuel.name: Spacefuel

spaceweed.description: While seen as part of every-day life in Teladi society, spaceweed has been made illegal in both Argon and Paranid space, as it is seen as a dangerous narcotic. This point is argued heavily by many of those who partake in the drug, which is usually dried, crushed and then smoked, but attempts to legalise it have as of yet failed.
spaceweed.name: Spaceweed

spices.description: Spices are used in many food and pharmaceutical products; primarily as an agent to add extra flavour, but also sometimes due to other properties that some are known to have, ranging from acting as a relaxant to a mild hallucinogenic. Factories that legally produce spices are commonly inspected to make sure their produce is in line with the local law, but as they are often shipped as a mixture, it is sometimes difficult to keep an eye on which spice is being used for which purpose.
spices.name: Spices

sunriseflowers.description: Known to grow naturally only on Ianamus Zura, the Teladi mastered the art of bio-engineering a near-identical but still artificially grown sunrise flower long ago. When squeezed, the leaves of the sunrise flower produce a bitter-tasting oil that while despised by other species, the Teladi appreciate as an adequate food source.
sunriseflowers.name: Sunrise Flowers

superfluidcoolant.description: Designed with superfluidity to ensure both efficiency and endurance, this coolant is used in complex technical components such as plasma conductors and quantum tubes to protect said components from overheating. The losslessness of kinetic energy afforded by the coolant's superfluidity means that it can continue to circulate around the component for a much longer time before needing to be recycled. This has led to such components lifetimes being greatly increased.
superfluidcoolant.name: Superfluid Coolant

swampplant.description: Cultivated in a warm and humid environment, swamp plant is a small moss-like plant known to have mildly narcotic properties; the reason it is dried and crushed to be used as space weed. Though it is widely known that swamp plant is the main ingredient of a drug made illegal throughout non-Teladi space, producing and trading it itself is not illegal, as it is only in the processing of the plant that the narcotic properties can be unlocked.
swampplant.name: Swamp Plant

teladianium.description: Teladianium is a hard, tough material used by the Teladi for station and, more commonly, ship construction. A lighter compound than the refined metals used in other races' vessels, Teladianium is traditionally made from chemically treated Teladian mud. However, as the necessary chemicals are rarely found in space, and expensive to produce, the Teladi often replace them with the raw minerals found in asteroids.
teladianium.name: Teladianium

turret_arg_l_beam_01_mk1.description: The Beam Turret is an entry-level defensive weapon system commonly selected by operators for its low acquisition cost. Its extensive effective range and high targeting accuracy make it particularly suitable for missile defence duties. While the weapon is effective against shielded targets, its damage output decreases as shields are depleted, limiting its effectiveness against exposed hull structures.nnThe L Beam Turret is an upgraded variant of the standard system, offering increased emitter capacity and sustained output. However, as with smaller variants, effectiveness against hull structures is reduced once shields are fully depleted. In single, forward-facing configurations, the system is nevertheless commonly employed to disrupt travel drive operation.
turret_arg_l_beam_01_mk1.name: ARG L Beam Turret Mk1

turret_arg_l_laser_01_mk1.description: The Pulse Turret is a versatile weapon, but is of limited use against capital ships and stations due to its relatively low damage output. It can otherwise be considered effective in engagement of a wide variety of targets.nnThe Large Pulse Turret improves on the performance of the medium-class version. In this format, its ability to inflict damage on all classes of target make it a true all-rounder.
turret_arg_l_laser_01_mk1.name: ARG L Pulse Turret Mk1

turret_arg_l_plasma_01_mk1.description: The greatest strength of the Plasma Turret is that it is an intrinsically "cool" technology, negating the need for the integrated cooling systems that are a feature of most armaments. This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.nnThe Large Plasma Turret implementation is a preferred choice for capital ships, where the number of emplacements can offset the limitations in manoeuvrability.
turret_arg_l_plasma_01_mk1.name: ARG L Plasma Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_beam_01_mk1.description: The Beam Turret is an entry-level defensive weapon system commonly selected by operators for its low acquisition cost. Its extensive effective range and high targeting accuracy make it particularly suitable for missile defence duties. While the weapon is effective against shielded targets, its damage output decreases as shields are depleted, limiting its effectiveness against exposed hull structures.
turret_arg_m_beam_01_mk1.name: ARG M Beam Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_beam_02_mk1.description: The Beam Turret is an entry-level defensive weapon system commonly selected by operators for its low acquisition cost. While the weapon is effective against shielded targets, its damage output decreases as shields are depleted, limiting its effectiveness against exposed hull structures.
turret_arg_m_beam_02_mk1.name: ARG M Beam Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_flak_01_mk1.description: Modern Flak Turret technology has not yet been fully exploited throughout the known systems, and it is jealously guarded by those who have access to it. It is a highly effective weapon at close quarters, particularly against fighters, due to its blast damage radius.nnThe Argon model has excellent projectile accuracy.
turret_arg_m_flak_01_mk1.name: ARG M Flak Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_flak_02_mk1.description: Modern Flak Turret technology has not yet been fully exploited throughout the known systems, and it is jealously guarded by those who have access to it. It is a highly effective weapon at close quarters, particularly against fighters, due to its blast damage radius.nnThe Argon model has excellent projectile accuracy.
turret_arg_m_flak_02_mk1.name: ARG M Flak Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_gatling_01_mk1.description: The Bolt Turret is a cost-effective defensive weapon system commonly used to deter hostile fighter-class targets. Some operators employ the system exclusively for missile defence duties, where its sustained fire provides reliable point protection.
turret_arg_m_gatling_01_mk1.name: ARG M Bolt Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_gatling_02_mk1.description: The Bolt Turret is a cost-effective defensive weapon system commonly used to deter hostile fighter-class targets. Some operators employ the system exclusively for missile defence duties, where its sustained fire provides reliable point protection.
turret_arg_m_gatling_02_mk1.name: ARG M Bolt Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_laser_01_mk1.description: The Pulse Turret is a versatile weapon, but is of limited use against capital ships and stations due to its relatively low damage output. It can otherwise be considered effective in engagement of a wide variety of targets.
turret_arg_m_laser_01_mk1.name: ARG M Pulse Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_laser_02_mk1.name: ARG M Pulse Turret Mk1

This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.
turret_arg_m_plasma_01_mk1.name: ARG M Plasma Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_plasma_02_mk1.description: The greatest strength of the Plasma Turret is that it is an intrinsically "cool" technology, negating the need for the integrated cooling systems that are a feature of most armaments. This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.
turret_arg_m_plasma_02_mk1.name: ARG M Plasma Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_shotgun_01_mk1.description: This turret weapon is optimised for medium-sized targets, as it lacks the accuracy to counter fighters, and the damage potential to take on capital ships effectively.nnThe Shard Turret delivers a spread of projectiles with a relatively short range. Heat management is a consideration for users of this weapon.
turret_arg_m_shotgun_01_mk1.name: ARG M Shard Turret Mk1

turret_arg_m_shotgun_02_mk1.description: This turret weapon is optimised for medium-sized targets, as it lacks the accuracy to counter fighters, and the damage potential to take on capital ships effectively.nnThe Shard Turret delivers a spread of projectiles with a relatively short range. Heat management is a consideration for users of this weapon.
turret_arg_m_shotgun_02_mk1.name: ARG M Shard Turret Mk1

turret_gen_m_scrapbeam_01_mk1.description: The Scrap Tractor employs an array of graviton beams to leash an object to a towing ship. The beams automatically and independently adjust their focus to further enhance the gravitational forces as the distance between the two objects becomes greater, resulting in an elasticity effect. All resistance is not futile, however, since severe disruptions, such as being hit by weapon fire, will cause the connection to break. Likewise, the graviton beams are inherently unstable until the artificial gravitational field is fully engaged, and even minor distortions such as the lingering effects of depleted shields, or electrical currents behind the target's hull, will prompt them to lose focus. Because of these limitations, the Scrap Tractor is mainly used to tow ship wrecks below a certain size limit, to avoid exceeding the maximum energy output of the weapon mount. For reasons which are not entirely clear, the connection remains stable during Jump Gate traversals.nnThe modern Scrap Tractor has only recently been made available to the wider Gate Network by the Alliance of the Word. The Alliance received the designs for it by deep space messenger drone, sent from the Avarice system, which was once thought lost. It is, however, by no means an entirely new technology. Before the Terran Conflict, and even up until the Gate Shutdown, a predecessor of this weapon - or rather tool - was occasionally deployed by opportunistic scavengers, looking to profit from the ongoing destruction of advanced warships in conflict zones. However, due to the general abundance of resources in the well-connected Gate Network at the time, and the inherent danger of the profession, it never saw widespread use, and the factories necessary for its production were often dismantled as quickly as they sprung up.
turret_gen_m_scrapbeam_01_mk1.name: Scrap Tractor

turret_kha_l_beam_01_mk1.description: The Kyon Turret, evolved from the dreaded Kyon Beams that haunt the nightmares of spacefaring civilisations. This formidable turret variant embodies the relentless and insidious nature of its creators.nnThough individually the damage of a single Kyon beam may appear modest for its size, its true potency lies in its ability to saturate the battlefield with a relentless barrage of energy pulses. Where Kha'ak vessels swarm, these turrets serve as harbingers of chaos, inflicting unavoidable damage on any who oppose them.
turret_kha_l_beam_01_mk1.name: KHA L Kyon Turret Mk1

turret_kha_m_beam_01_mk1.description: Utilising the same technology as the Kyon Emitter, the Kha'ak Kyon Turret is a formidable defensive weapon, often adorning the species' stations in large numbers.
turret_kha_m_beam_01_mk1.name: KHA M Kyon Turret Mk1

turret_par_l_beam_01_mk1.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
turret_par_l_beam_01_mk1.name: PAR L Mass Driver Turret Mk1

turret_par_m_shotgun_01_mk1.description: The Blast Mortar fires a compact high-explosive charge encapsulated by superheated chondritic material. A proximity fuse triggers detonation near the target, with a wide blast radius compensating for the system's limited accuracy. The affected area is sufficient to neutralise multiple surface elements on capital ships with a single discharge.nnIt is often compared favourably to the Plasma Cannon due to its higher projectile velocity, enabling limited engagement of smaller targets when required. However, it is not a flak weapon and is most effectively employed against medium or larger vessels that cannot readily evade fire.nnDeveloped before the formal proclamation of the Holy Order of the Pontifex, the Blast Mortar reflects early Paranid efforts to maximise combat effectiveness under constrained industrial capacity. The result is a weapon that combines high destructive output with relative manufacturing simplicity.
turret_par_m_shotgun_01_mk1.name: PAR M Blast Mortar Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_beam_01_mk1.name: TEL M Beam Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_beam_02_mk1.description: The Beam Turret is an entry-level defensive weapon system commonly selected by operators for its low acquisition cost. Its extensive effective range and high targeting accuracy make it particularly suitable for missile defence duties. While the weapon is effective against shielded targets, its damage output decreases as shields are depleted, limiting its effectiveness against exposed hull structures.
turret_tel_m_beam_02_mk1.name: TEL M Beam Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_gatling_01_mk1.description: The Bolt Turret is a cost-effective defensive weapon system commonly used to deter hostile fighter-class targets. Some operators employ the system exclusively for missile defence duties, where its sustained fire provides reliable point protection.
turret_tel_m_gatling_01_mk1.name: TEL M Bolt Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_gatling_02_mk1.description: The Bolt Turret is a cost-effective defensive weapon system commonly used to deter hostile fighter-class targets. Some operators employ the system exclusively for missile defence duties, where its sustained fire provides reliable point protection.
turret_tel_m_gatling_02_mk1.name: TEL M Bolt Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_laser_01_mk1.description: The Pulse Turret is a versatile weapon, but is of limited use against capital ships and stations due to its relatively low damage output. It can otherwise be considered effective in engagement of a wide variety of targets.
turret_tel_m_laser_01_mk1.name: TEL M Pulse Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_laser_02_mk1.description: The Pulse Turret is a versatile weapon, but is of limited use against capital ships and stations due to its relatively low damage output. It can otherwise be considered effective in engagement of a wide variety of targets.
turret_tel_m_laser_02_mk1.name: TEL M Pulse Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_plasma_01_mk1.description: The greatest strength of the Plasma Turret is that it is an intrinsically "cool" technology, negating the need for the integrated cooling systems that are a feature of most armaments. This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.
turret_tel_m_plasma_01_mk1.name: TEL M Plasma Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_plasma_02_mk1.description: The greatest strength of the Plasma Turret is that it is an intrinsically "cool" technology, negating the need for the integrated cooling systems that are a feature of most armaments. This allows this otherwise relatively slow turret to be a constant threat to larger adversaries.
turret_tel_m_plasma_02_mk1.name: TEL M Plasma Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_shotgun_01_mk1.description: The Muon Disintegrator deploys a short-range projectile that adheres to its target and disrupts electromagnetic bonds in both shielding and baryonic matter. While the muon particles remain active, affected shields and travel drives are unable to recharge, reducing the target's ability to disengage or recover under fire.nnDeveloped by the Ministry of Finance Science Division in response to advances in shield efficiency and travel drive regeneration, the system was intended as a countermeasure rather than a raw damage solution. Although early adoption was limited in favour of the more immediate output of plasma-based weapons, the increased presence of Terran and Boron propulsion technology has renewed operational interest in the Muon Disintegrator.
turret_tel_m_shotgun_01_mk1.name: TEL M Muon Blaster Turret Mk1

turret_tel_m_shotgun_02_mk1.description: The Muon Disintegrator deploys a short-range projectile that adheres to its target and disrupts electromagnetic bonds in both shielding and baryonic matter. While the muon particles remain active, affected shields and travel drives are unable to recharge, reducing the target's ability to disengage or recover under fire.nnDeveloped by the Ministry of Finance Science Division in response to advances in shield efficiency and travel drive regeneration, the system was intended as a countermeasure rather than a raw damage solution. Although early adoption was limited in favour of the more immediate output of plasma-based weapons, the increased presence of Terran and Boron propulsion technology has renewed operational interest in the Muon Disintegrator.
turret_tel_m_shotgun_02_mk1.name: TEL M Muon Blaster Turret Mk1

turret_xen_l_laser_01_mk1.description: The Xenon Graviton Turret is among the most effective turret weapons available for engaging capital-class targets. It operates on exotic energy principle, prioritising destructive output over accuracy.nnTerran arms manufacturers have declined to comment on whether analysis of Xenon graviton technology has influenced the development of their own heavy weapon systems.
turret_xen_l_laser_01_mk1.name: XEN L Graviton Turret Mk1

turret_xen_l_plasma_01_mk1.description: Originally designed to break apart asteroids as part of the historic terraforming projects, the Xenon have since repurposed the Seismic Charge Turret for the rigours of interstellar conflict.nnHarnessing the power of controlled energy manipulation, the Seismic Charge Turret propels a volatile sphere of concentrated energy towards its target. Upon nearing its mark, the energy sphere detonates with explosive force, unleashing a concussive shockwave that reverberates through the void.nnOperating at a measured pace, the Seismic Charge Turret trades sheer volume of fire for precision and impact. Its deliberate rate of fire, coupled with the potent explosive capabilities of each projectile, renders it most effective against medium and large ships, where its concussive force can inflict significant damage and disrupt enemy formations.
turret_xen_l_plasma_01_mk1.name: XEN L Seismic Charge Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_beam_02_mk1.description: One of the less effective Xenon weapons, the Xenon Positron Turret is relatively weak individually, and has a range shorter than most comparable weapons. However, the sheer numbers of turrets installed on Xenon stations in particular, can add up to a formidable defensive system.nnIt is hypothesised that this operational deployment by the Xenon is based on the weapon having a low resource cost compared to its likely lifetime usage.
turret_xen_m_beam_02_mk1.name: XEN M Positron Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_gatling_01_mk1.description: Originally used as a construction tool, the Needler Turret remains at its core what it has always been, a colossal nail gun designed for heavy duty construction projects. Over time the Xenon have adapted it from firing mundane nails and rivets, to having ammunition chambers housing armour-piercing projectiles, allowing it to deliver devastating blows to enemy ships.nnWhile the Needler Turret may not posses the overwhelming force of some heavier armaments, between its wide angle of fire as a turret, its fast rate of fire, and each projectile being propelled with startling velocity, it makes a stalwart choice for a variety of scenarios.
turret_xen_m_gatling_01_mk1.name: XEN M Needler Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_gatling_02_mk1.description: Originally used as a construction tool, the Needler Turret remains at its core what it has always been, a colossal nail gun designed for heavy duty construction projects. Over time the Xenon have adapted it from firing mundane nails and rivets, to having ammunition chambers housing armour-piercing projectiles, allowing it to deliver devastating blows to enemy ships.nnWhile the Needler Turret may not posses the overwhelming force of some heavier armaments, between its wide angle of fire as a turret, its fast rate of fire, and each projectile being propelled with startling velocity, it makes a stalwart choice for a variety of scenarios.
turret_xen_m_gatling_02_mk1.name: XEN M Needler Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_laser_01_mk1.description: Considered to be an analogue of the commonly used Pulse Turret, the Xenon M Impulse Turret showers targets in a high volume of fire. It is notably effective against fighters.
turret_xen_m_laser_01_mk1.name: XEN M Impulse Turret Mk1

turret_xen_m_laser_02_mk1.description: Considered to be an analogue of the commonly used Pulse Turret, the Xenon M Impulse Turret showers targets in a high volume of fire. It is notably effective against fighters.
turret_xen_m_laser_02_mk1.name: XEN M Impulse Turret Mk1

turretcomponents.description: After the unification of the design process in station and capital ship weapon systems, many different turrets can be built from different configurations of these turret components.
turretcomponents.name: Turret Components

water.description: Essential to all known biological life forms, water has never become much of a catalyst for dispute amongst species, owing to its ubiquity in space. It is being used somewhere in the manufacturing process of nearly all goods available across space; especially, however, in the production of edible goods.
water.name: Water

waypointmarker_01.description: Nav beacons remain the last and best ally of the lost pilot. Once deployed, the beacon will emit a light strong enough to cut through even the thickest nebula, and at a frequency that can be seldom missed. They are often dropped strategically throughout dangerous parts of space, to designate a safe route, or intermittently in heavy nebulas to guarantee that even the worst pilot has a chance of finding their way back home.
waypointmarker_01.name: Nav Beacon

weapon_arg_l_destroyer_01_mk1.description: The Argon Behemoth main battery is a powerful and reliable capital ship weapon, albeit lacking in showiness. Designed in a rare period of Argon peacetime, it smacks of something of an afterthought.nnLegend has it that the first Behemoth was in service for three standard months before the Captain and crew realised that the Argon Prime shipyard had, in fact, neglected to install the main battery.nnAll requests to the Argon military for confirmation of this rumour are generally met with dark silence and furrowed brows.
weapon_arg_l_destroyer_01_mk1.name: ARG Behemoth Main Battery

weapon_arg_m_ion_01_mk1.description: Developed by the Argon Navy in collaboration with Jinko-Tekina Technologies, this anti-shield weapon is an approximation of Boron ion technology, access to which was lost following the Jump Gate shutdown. While early prototypes underperformed, incremental enhancements to electrical field strength have significantly improved performance, narrowing the gap with the original design.nnIn addition to severe shield degradation, the weapon's electrical discharge can momentarily disable the travel drive, boost engine, and targeting systems on small to medium-class vessels.
weapon_arg_m_ion_01_mk1.name: ARG M Ion Blaster Mk1

weapon_arg_m_ion_01_mk2.description: Developed by the Argon Navy in collaboration with Jinko-Tekina Technologies, this anti-shield weapon is an approximation of Boron ion technology, access to which was lost following the Jump Gate shutdown. While early prototypes underperformed, incremental enhancements to electrical field strength have significantly improved performance, narrowing the gap with the original design.nnIn addition to severe shield degradation, the weapon's electrical discharge can momentarily disable the travel drive, boost engine, and targeting systems on small to medium-class vessels.
weapon_arg_m_ion_01_mk2.name: ARG M Ion Blaster Mk2
