weapon_gen_m_beam_01_mk1.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_m_beam_01_mk1.name: M Beam Emitter Mk1

weapon_gen_m_beam_01_mk2.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_m_beam_01_mk2.name: M Beam Emitter Mk2

weapon_gen_m_gatling_01_mk1.description: The Bolt Repeater offers balanced damage output and thermal performance, making it a common selection for general-purpose use. It is typically positioned as a progression from the Pulse Laser, retaining sustained firing capability while employing larger, slower-moving projectiles. This allows prolonged bursts capable of effectively engaging targets of comparable size, though effective use depends on disciplined burst control and heat management.nnThe reduced projectile velocity allows smaller, highly agile vessels to evade fire under favourable conditions. Against capital ships, the Bolt Repeater is suitable for disabling exposed surface elements such as turrets and shield generators, though its effectiveness against hull structures is limited.nnThe current Bolt Repeater design originates from Argon military development programmes based on earlier Mass Driver technology dating back to the Kha'ak conflict era. By removing shield-penetration capability and focusing instead on sustained projectile output, the resulting system achieved a reliable general-purpose profile that saw widespread adoption among Federation-aligned forces.
weapon_gen_m_gatling_01_mk1.name: M Bolt Repeater Mk1

weapon_gen_m_gatling_01_mk2.name: M Bolt Repeater Mk2

weapon_gen_m_laser_01_mk1.description: Many experienced pilots fondly remember the affordable and reliable Pulse Laser as their first weapon. Its pin-point accuracy and high projectile speed make it an excellent choice for fighting small and fast targets, handling fragile lockboxes, and for dealing with deployables like mines and laser towers. Often initially scoffed at for its comparatively low damage output, its slow heat generation and sublime cooling result in a steady stream of disruptive fire, which in turn rewards pilots who can stay on target for an extended period. Faced with larger enemies, the Pulse Laser does not become obsolete as quickly as one might expect. Used in greater numbers, it can still be a formidable choice against frigates and corvettes, though an upgrade to a larger weapon mount may be advisable to maintain a level playing field. The Pulse Laser remains the preferred choice of commanders who favour versatility over optimisation against specific opponents, or who have little trust in the aim of their subordinates.nnThe technology behind the Pulse Laser is advanced and efficient. Within a shielded chamber, microscopic fragments of matter are superheated and accelerated by a pulsed neodymium laser. The weapon was originally designed by the Ministry of Finance to provide a robust loadout for their escort fleets, without having to invest time and resources into the maintenance of a well-rounded combined arms setup. Over time, and thanks to the Teladi Company's aggressive marketing, it has been adopted as the number one weapon of convenience by all other former members of the Community of Planets.nnThe Mk2 variant sports a slightly longer burst. This lowers the efficiency of the heat dissipation between bursts and thereby exponentially drives up the cost of the internal shielding, but results in an overall higher damage output.
weapon_gen_m_laser_01_mk1.name: M Pulse Laser Mk1

weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk1.description: For primary resource collectors, the Mk 1 Small Mining Drill is an entry-level tool used for asteroid mining. It is available in an upgraded Mk 2 format.nnMore established miners generally opt for the Medium Mining Drill, which is also available in Mk 1 and Mk 2 configurations.
weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk1.name: M Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk2.description: For primary resource collectors, the Mk 1 Small Mining Drill is an entry-level tool used for asteroid mining. It is available in an upgraded Mk 2 format.nnMore established miners generally opt for the Medium Mining Drill, which is also available in Mk 1 and Mk 2 configurations.
weapon_gen_m_mining_01_mk2.name: M Mining Drill Mk2

weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk1.description: The Plasma Cannon is a long-range heavy weapon system delivering high damage per projectile. Its effectiveness is offset by slow projectile velocity, a low rate of fire, and substantial heat generation, making accurate shot placement critical. These characteristics favour its use against capital-class targets, where target size and predictability mitigate its handling limitations, particularly in concerted combat formations.nnWhile short-range systems such as the Shard Battery and Split Tau Accelerator can exceed its damage output under optimal conditions, the Plasma Cannon's principal advantage lies in its extended engagement range. Although capable of engaging smaller vessels, effectiveness in such roles depends on favourable positioning and timing rather than sustained fire.nnThe Plasma Cannon was developed by the Holy Order of the Pontifex shortly after the onset of the Paranid Schism, building on earlier High Energy Plasma Thrower technology. As with its predecessor, high radiation build-up necessitates periodic purging between firing cycles to prevent damage to the weapon system. The design blueprint was later acquired by the Argon Secret Service and disseminated throughout the Commonwealth following the Argon Federation's entry into the conflict.
weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk1.name: M Plasma Cannon Mk1

weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk2.description: The Plasma Cannon is a long-range heavy weapon system delivering high damage per projectile. Its effectiveness is offset by slow projectile velocity, a low rate of fire, and substantial heat generation, making accurate shot placement critical. These characteristics favour its use against capital-class targets, where target size and predictability mitigate its handling limitations, particularly in concerted combat formations.nnWhile short-range systems such as the Shard Battery and Split Tau Accelerator can exceed its damage output under optimal conditions, the Plasma Cannon's principal advantage lies in its extended engagement range. Although capable of engaging smaller vessels, effectiveness in such roles depends on favourable positioning and timing rather than sustained fire.nnThe Plasma Cannon was developed by the Holy Order of the Pontifex shortly after the onset of the Paranid Schism, building on earlier High Energy Plasma Thrower technology. As with its predecessor, high radiation build-up necessitates periodic purging between firing cycles to prevent damage to the weapon system. The design blueprint was later acquired by the Argon Secret Service and disseminated throughout the Commonwealth following the Argon Federation's entry into the conflict.
weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk2.name: M Plasma Cannon Mk2

weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk1.description: The Shard Battery is a short-range kinetic weapon system characterised by the simultaneous discharge of multiple projectiles. This configuration compensates for limited accuracy and effective range by delivering high damage against both shields and hulls. Functionally, the system is derived from the Bolt Repeater, though the requirement for a wider barrel aperture and increased projectile spacing results in higher energy consumption.nnIn terms of raw damage output, the Shard Battery is often compared to the Plasma Cannon, though it serves a different tactical role. It performs most effectively against larger, slower targets such as M-sized vessels, which are less able to evade its projectile spread. The weapon is also well suited to engaging capital ship surface elements from inside their defensive turrets' dead angle.
weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk1.name: M Shard Battery Mk1

weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk2.description: The Shard Battery is a short-range kinetic weapon system characterised by the simultaneous discharge of multiple projectiles. This configuration compensates for limited accuracy and effective range by delivering high damage against both shields and hulls. weapon_gen_m_shotgun_01_mk2.name: M Shard Battery Mk2

weapon_gen_mine_01.description: Mines are a commonly-used static combat tool that explode and cause massive hull damage under a number of circumstances. Some explode on contact, some when a target comes within a certain range. Some even track their targets and can be programmed to recognise friend from foe.
weapon_gen_mine_01.name: Mine

weapon_gen_mine_02.description: Tracker Mines are deadly devices that have two phases of operation. In the detection phase, the mine detects a valid target within outer detection range and initiates a limited manoeuvre to intercept the target. When it is deemed close enough to trigger, the second detection phase sees the mine's explosive payload detonate. Tracker Mines are less effective at chasing fast and agile targets, but can be incredibly dangerous when used in number or against larger and less agile targets.
weapon_gen_mine_02.name: Tracker Mine

weapon_gen_mine_03.description: Friend/Foe Mines are equipped with specialist software that allows the user to program the mine not to respond to friendly targets. This is usually achieved over comm-frequency identification, and friendly targets must stay informed of changes to the frequency so as not to accidentally fall foul of the mine's dangerous payload - this, in and of itself, is almost always an automated process.
weapon_gen_mine_03.name: Friend/Foe Mine

weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk1.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk1.name: S Beam Emitter Mk1

weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk2.description: The Beam Emitter is a long-range energy weapon characterised by high accuracy and near-instantaneous impact. It projects a focused energy beam optimised for shield depletion rather than hull damage, leading to widespread use by both security forces and criminal organisations.nnAs with any energy weapon that generates thermal load during operation, sustained firing is more efficient than repeated short bursts.
weapon_gen_s_beam_01_mk2.name: S Beam Emitter Mk2

weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk1.description: The Burst Ray is a short-range weapon system optimised for disabling capital ship surface elements. It delivers damage through rapid, sequenced emissions that apply concentrated radiation beams to exposed subsystems, causing the target's surface to lose molecular cohesion. This makes it particularly effective against engines, shield generators, and turret installations.nnThis specialised role comes with clear limitations. The Burst Ray exhibits limited effectiveness against primary shield arrays and hull structures, and its short engagement range restricts its utility in general-purpose combat, particularly against small and medium-sized vessels. The instantaneous application of its individual beams can nevertheless offer situational effectiveness against small and evasive targets.nnThe weapon's development is attributed to initiatives within the Paranid theocracy, reportedly commissioned in response to an increasing reliance on heavy fleets and long-range armaments during internal doctrinal shifts.
weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk1.name: S Burst Ray Mk1

weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk2.description: The Burst Ray is a short-range weapon system optimised for disabling capital ship surface elements. It delivers damage through rapid, sequenced emissions that apply concentrated radiation beams to exposed subsystems, causing the target's surface to lose molecular cohesion. This makes it particularly effective against engines, shield generators, and turret installations.nnThis specialised role comes with clear limitations. The Burst Ray exhibits limited effectiveness against primary shield arrays and hull structures, and its short engagement range restricts its utility in general-purpose combat, particularly against small and medium-sized vessels. The instantaneous application of its individual beams can nevertheless offer situational effectiveness against small and evasive targets.nnThe weapon's development is attributed to initiatives within the Paranid theocracy, reportedly commissioned in response to an increasing reliance on heavy fleets and long-range armaments during internal doctrinal shifts.
weapon_gen_s_burst_01_mk2.name: S Burst Ray Mk2

weapon_gen_s_cannon_01_mk1.description: The Blast Mortar fires a compact high-explosive charge encapsulated by superheated chondritic material. A proximity fuse triggers detonation near the target, with a wide blast radius compensating for the system's limited accuracy. The affected area is sufficient to neutralise multiple surface elements on capital ships with a single discharge.nnIt is often compared favourably to the Plasma Cannon due to its higher projectile velocity, enabling limited engagement of smaller targets when required. However, it is not a flak weapon and is most effectively employed against medium or larger vessels that cannot readily evade fire.nnDeveloped before the formal proclamation of the Holy Order of the Pontifex, the Blast Mortar reflects early Paranid efforts to maximise combat effectiveness under constrained industrial capacity. The result is a weapon that combines high destructive output with relative manufacturing simplicity.
weapon_gen_s_cannon_01_mk1.name: S Blast Mortar Mk1

The Pulse Laser remains the preferred choice of commanders who favour versatility over optimisation against specific opponents, or who have little trust in the aim of their subordinates.nnThe technology behind the Pulse Laser is advanced and efficient. Within a shielded chamber, microscopic fragments of matter are superheated and accelerated by a pulsed neodymium laser. The weapon was originally designed by the Ministry of Finance to provide a robust loadout for their escort fleets, without having to invest time and resources into the maintenance of a well-rounded combined arms setup. Over time, and thanks to the Teladi Company's aggressive marketing, it has been adopted as the number one weapon of convenience by all other former members of the Community of Planets.nnThe Mk2 variant sports a slightly longer burst. This lowers the efficiency of the heat dissipation between bursts and thereby exponentially drives up the cost of the internal shielding, but results in an overall higher damage output.
weapon_gen_s_laser_01_mk1.name: S Pulse Laser Mk1

weapon_gen_s_laser_01_mk2.description: Many experienced pilots fondly remember the affordable and reliable Pulse Laser as their first weapon. Its pin-point accuracy and high projectile speed make it an excellent choice for fighting small and fast targets, handling fragile lockboxes, and for dealing with deployables like mines and laser towers. Often initially scoffed at for its comparatively low damage output, its slow heat generation and sublime cooling result in a steady stream of disruptive fire, which in turn rewards pilots who can stay on target for an extended period. Faced with larger enemies, the Pulse Laser does not become obsolete as quickly as one might expect. Used in greater numbers, it can still be a formidable choice against frigates and corvettes, though an upgrade to a larger weapon mount may be advisable to maintain a level playing field. weapon_gen_s_laser_01_mk2.name: S Pulse Laser Mk2

weapon_gen_s_mining_01_mk1.description: For primary resource collectors, the Mk 1 Small Mining Drill is an entry-level tool used for asteroid mining. It is available in an upgraded Mk 2 format.
weapon_gen_s_mining_01_mk1.name: S Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_gen_s_mining_01_mk2.description: For primary resource collectors, the Mk 1 Small Mining Drill is an entry-level tool used for asteroid mining. It is available in an upgraded Mk 2 format.
weapon_gen_s_mining_01_mk2.name: S Mining Drill Mk2

weapon_gen_s_plasma_01_mk1.description: The Plasma Cannon is a long-range heavy weapon system delivering high damage per projectile. Its effectiveness is offset by slow projectile velocity, a low rate of fire, and substantial heat generation, making accurate shot placement critical. These characteristics favour its use against capital-class targets, where target size and predictability mitigate its handling limitations, particularly in concerted combat formations.nnWhile short-range systems such as the Shard Battery and Split Tau Accelerator can exceed its damage output under optimal conditions, the Plasma Cannon's principal advantage lies in its extended engagement range. Although capable of engaging smaller vessels, effectiveness in such roles depends on favourable positioning and timing rather than sustained fire.nnThe Plasma Cannon was developed by the Holy Order of the Pontifex shortly after the onset of the Paranid Schism, building on earlier High Energy Plasma Thrower technology. As with its predecessor, high radiation build-up necessitates periodic purging between firing cycles to prevent damage to the weapon system. The design blueprint was later acquired by the Argon Secret Service and disseminated throughout the Commonwealth following the Argon Federation's entry into the conflict.
weapon_gen_s_plasma_01_mk1.name: S Plasma Cannon Mk1

weapon_gen_s_plasma_01_mk2.name: S Plasma Cannon Mk2

weapon_gen_s_shotgun_01_mk1.description: The Shard Battery is a short-range kinetic weapon system characterised by the simultaneous discharge of multiple projectiles. This configuration compensates for limited accuracy and effective range by delivering high damage against both shields and hulls. Functionally, the system is derived from the Bolt Repeater, though the requirement for a wider barrel aperture and increased projectile spacing results in higher energy consumption.nnIn terms of raw damage output, the Shard Battery is often compared to the Plasma Cannon, though it serves a different tactical role. It performs most effectively against larger, slower targets such as M-sized vessels, which are less able to evade its projectile spread. The weapon is also well suited to engaging capital ship surface elements from inside their defensive turrets' dead angle.
weapon_gen_s_shotgun_01_mk1.name: S Shard Battery Mk1

weapon_gen_s_shotgun_01_mk2.description: The Shard Battery is a short-range kinetic weapon system characterised by the simultaneous discharge of multiple projectiles. This configuration compensates for limited accuracy and effective range by delivering high damage against both shields and hulls. The weapon is also well suited to engaging capital ship surface elements from inside their defensive turrets' dead angle.
weapon_gen_s_shotgun_01_mk2.name: S Shard Battery Mk2

weapon_gen_spacesuit_demolition_01_mk1.description: The spacesuit-mounted bomb launcher is a lightweight deployment system for small-scale offensive ordinance. This includes spacesuit EMPs and explosives, which seek to attach themselves to targets after launch.nnCaution is advised.
weapon_gen_spacesuit_demolition_01_mk1.name: Bomb Launcher

weapon_gen_spacesuit_laser_01_mk1.description: The hand laser is the entry level sidearm. Being marginally more suitable for cutting chelt meat than for actual combat, it has spawned the now famous idiom, "Never bring a hand laser to a blaster fight".
weapon_gen_spacesuit_laser_01_mk1.name: Hand Laser

weapon_gen_spacesuit_laser_02_mk1.description: The Personal Blaster is a sidearm often preferred by those who cannot rely on their targets keeping still long enough for a hand laser to yield damage.
weapon_gen_spacesuit_laser_02_mk1.name: Personal Blaster

weapon_gen_spacesuit_repairlaser_01_mk1.description: A spacesuit-borne repair function, directed and powered through a narrow energy beam. While a labour-intensive means of repair, stricken pilots may find substantial comfort in its distinctive, green flashes.
weapon_gen_spacesuit_repairlaser_01_mk1.name: Repair Laser

weapon_kha_l_beam_01_mk1.description: Forged from the darkest depths of Kha'ak technology, the Ravager Main Battery harnesses the raw energy of the cosmos to generate a focused particle beam of unparalleled potency. Each searing blast from its menacing barrel strikes with pinpoint accuracy, tearing through the defences of capital ships with ease.nnDesigned to deliver devastating blows against enemy capital vessels, this weapon serves as the primary armament of Kha'ak Destroyers, ensuring their dominance on the battlefield. Its overwhelming firepower and relentless precision make it a fearsome adversary for any enemy of the Kha'ak.
weapon_kha_l_beam_01_mk1.name: KHA Ravager Main Battery

weapon_kha_m_laser_01_mk1.description: The Kha'ak Kyon Emitter offers limited individual output when compared with contemporary beam weapons. Its effectiveness relies on massed deployment: when employed in coordinated swarm formations, multiple emitters can be brought to bear simultaneously, resulting in a cumulative damage profile capable of overwhelming targets despite the weapon's modest standalone performance.nnThe Kyon Emitter has also been seen, and in some cases salvaged, in a format comparable to Medium Class conventional weapons. As expected, this larger format is more damaging.
weapon_kha_m_laser_01_mk1.name: KHA M Kyon Emitter Mk1

weapon_kha_s_laser_01_mk1.description: The Kha'ak Kyon Emitter offers limited individual output when compared with contemporary beam weapons. Its effectiveness relies on massed deployment: when employed in coordinated swarm formations, multiple emitters can be brought to bear simultaneously, resulting in a cumulative damage profile capable of overwhelming targets despite the weapon's modest standalone performance.
weapon_kha_s_laser_01_mk1.name: KHA S Kyon Emitter Mk1

weapon_kha_xl_battleship_01_mk1.description: The Obliterator Main Battery stands as a towering testament to the overwhelming destructive capabilities that the Kha'ak can bring to bear. This fearsome particle beam gun represents the pinnacle of anti-capital ship armaments, capable of unleashing cataclysmic devastation upon any who dare to challenge Kha'ak supremacy.nnWhen unleashed upon capital ships, its searing beam cuts through shields and armour alike with ruthless efficiency, easily rending even the mightiest vessels asunder. Yet it is the weapon's terrifying secondary function that instils dread in the hearts of all who witness its unleashed fury. When pushed to its limits through overcharge, the Obliterator Main Battery transforms into a planet destroyer, a doomsday weapon of unparalleled devastation.
weapon_kha_xl_battleship_01_mk1.name: KHA Obliterator Main Battery

weapon_par_l_destroyer_01_mk1.description: Weaponsmith Ebmancketvahs considered the Odysseus main battery to be his career crowning achievement. He resolved to spend however long it would take in complete silence, moving to a house of worship in Trinity Sanctum for a retreat that extended to five years in length.nnOn delivering the plans for what was to become, perhaps, the most powerful weapon in the Paranid armoury, Ebmancketvahs was feted by the ecclesiastical authorities and there remains, to this day, a statue honouring him in Trinity Sanctum.
weapon_par_l_destroyer_01_mk1.name: PAR Odysseus Main Battery

weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk1.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk1.name: PAR M Mass Driver Mk1

weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk2.description: The Mass Driver launches a single high-energy kinetic projectile capable of retaining accuracy and effectiveness over extended ranges. Thermal charging commences upon weapon activation, allowing the operator to either discharge immediately or delay firing for improved targeting.
weapon_par_m_railgun_01_mk2.name: PAR M Mass Driver Mk2

weapon_tel_l_destroyer_01_mk1.description: Early production runs of the Phoenix destroyer incorporated weapon systems derived from both Argon and Paranid designs. While expedient, this approach exposed the Teladi Company to prolonged legal disputes, resulting in reduced confidence in external licencing arrangements. The matter was ultimately settled out of court, prompting the accelerated development of a proprietary main battery derived from Muon Disintegrator technology.nnOfficially, this new weapon was advertised as a significant improvement over the Behemoth's primary armament; however, comparative assessments indicated broadly equivalent performance. Its defining characteristics are inherited from smaller Muon-based systems, delivering enhanced damage against shield systems while inhibiting shield and travel drive recharge. While these properties align with the Phoenix's high-mobility doctrine, they have also seen use among illegal operators.
weapon_tel_l_destroyer_01_mk1.name: TEL Phoenix Main Battery

weapon_tel_m_charge_01_mk1.description: The Muon Disintegrator deploys a short-range projectile that adheres to its target and disrupts electromagnetic bonds in both shielding and baryonic matter. While the muon particles remain active, affected shields and travel drives are unable to recharge, reducing the target's ability to disengage or recover under fire.nnDeveloped by the Ministry of Finance Science Division in response to advances in shield efficiency and travel drive regeneration, the system was intended as a countermeasure rather than a raw damage solution. Although early adoption was limited in favour of the more immediate output of plasma-based weapons, the increased presence of Terran and Boron propulsion technology has renewed operational interest in the Muon Disintegrator.
weapon_tel_m_charge_01_mk1.name: TEL M Muon Disintegrator Mk1

weapon_xen_m_beam_01_mk1.description: Though originally designed for salvage operations to disassemble wrecks, the Plasma Cutter Beam has been repurposed into a deadly weapon of war.nnOperating on a principle of short-lived bursts of devastating energy, the Plasma Cutter Beam boasts a formidable initial onslaught capable of inflicting heavy damage upon unsuspecting adversaries. Though its reload time is protracted and its lifespan brief, when used effectively, the coordinated fire of multiple beams can unleash a torrent of destruction upon any target within range.
weapon_xen_m_beam_01_mk1.name: XEN M Plasma Cutter Beam Mk1

weapon_xen_m_laser_01_mk1.description: The Xenon Impulse Projector is a high-rate, low-velocity projectile weapon, which in the wrong circumstances, can be a particular threat to smaller vessels. It seems that novel converter topologies enable a greater range than would be expected under current understanding of the technology.nnThe Impulse Projector has been observed in an apparent Medium Class format, which takes this Xenon technology to a higher level of lethality.
weapon_xen_m_laser_01_mk1.name: XEN M Impulse Projector Mk1

weapon_xen_m_laser_02_mk1.description: The Xenon Impulse Projector is a high-rate, low-velocity projectile weapon, which in the wrong circumstances, can be a particular threat to smaller vessels. It seems that novel converter topologies enable a greater range than would be expected under current understanding of the technology.nnThe Impulse Projector has been observed in an apparent Medium Class format, which takes this Xenon technology to a higher level of lethality.
weapon_xen_m_laser_02_mk1.name: XEN M Impulse Projector Mk1

weapon_xen_m_mining_01_mk1.description: This ship module is apparently a Xenon Mining Drill, however, it is unclear what performance it delivers and whether it is optimised for the collection of specific minerals. There is continued debate over whether this module has other applicable uses.
weapon_xen_m_mining_01_mk1.name: XEN M Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_xen_m_mining_02_mk1.description: This ship module is apparently a Xenon Mining Drill, however, it is unclear what performance it delivers and whether it is optimised for the collection of specific minerals. There is continued debate over whether this module has other applicable uses.
weapon_xen_m_mining_02_mk1.name: XEN M Mining Drill Mk1

weapon_xen_s_gatling_01_mk1.description: Originally used as a construction tool, the Needler Gun remains at its core what it has always been, a huge nail gun designed for heavy duty construction projects. Over time the Xenon have adapted it from firing mundane nails and rivets, to having ammunition chambers housing armour-piercing projectiles, allowing it to deliver devastating blows to enemy ships.nnThe Needler Gun's high rate of fire transforms what would otherwise be a minor annoyance into a significant stopping power. It is able to cover its target with hits at a rate that can produce significant structural damage in a short amount of time.
weapon_xen_s_gatling_01_mk1.name: XEN S Needler Gun Mk1

weapon_xen_s_laser_01_mk1.description: The Xenon Impulse Projector is a high-rate, low-velocity projectile weapon, which in the wrong circumstances, can be a particular threat to smaller vessels. It seems that novel converter topologies enable a greater range than would be expected under current understanding of the technology.
weapon_xen_s_laser_01_mk1.name: XEN S Impulse Projector Mk1

weaponcomponents.description: Made up from such things as trigger and reloading mechanisms, chambers and barrels, weapon components make up the mechanical part of all ship weapons. Combined with specialised advanced electronics, a number of different weapons can be made from the modular components, also across different size ranges. Shipped to shipyards and equipment docks as a single package, these components can then be put together relatively quickly and easily to make any weapon for the final customer on-demand.
weaponcomponents.name: Weapon Components

wheat.description: A staple ingredient in food rations, wheat is grown across all of Argon space and consumed on a daily basis in the form of flatbread or bunyos. Where meat is still produced from Argnu, instead of synthesised or cloned, wheat is also fed to the animals, which results in meat of exceptional quality.
wheat.name: Wheat
